# Las Vegas Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Free Las Vegas bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
lasvegasbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Las Vegas - Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/chapter-13.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Las Vegas - Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/chapter-7.html
- How Much Does Bankruptcy Cost in Las Vegas? - Filing Fees, Attorney Fees: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/cost.html
- Nevada Bankruptcy Exemptions - What You Can Keep - Las Vegas: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/exemptions.html
- Las Vegas Bankruptcy FAQ - Common Questions Answered: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/faq.html
- Las Vegas Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/
- Las Vegas Bankruptcy Resources - Courts, Legal Aid, Credit Counseling: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/resources.html
- Las Vegas Bankruptcy Statistics - 47,516 Cases Analyzed: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/statistics.html
- What to Expect When Filing Bankruptcy in Las Vegas - Timeline, 341 Meeting, Discharge: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/what-to-expect.html
- Privacy Policy: https://lasvegasbankruptcy.org/privacy.html

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
